zh-CN.Child Time Guard - Config: 儿童时间守护 - 配置
zh-CN.Children, the break starts in %d minutes: 小朋友，%d分钟后开始休息。
zh-CN.Children, go and see the scenery in the: 小朋友，去看看远方的风景，或朗读您最喜欢书籍/故事。
结束时间必须晚于开始时间。
zh-CN.End time must be in HH:MM (24-hour) form: 结束时间必须为 HH:MM（24 小时制）格式。
zh-CN.Failed to update parent PIN, Please try: 更新家长密码失败，请重试。
zh-CN.Children, it's time to sleep. Power off: 小朋友，要睡觉了，%d分钟后自动关机。
zh-CN.Children, it's time to sleep; those who: 小朋友，要睡觉了；早睡的小朋友，长得高高的。
zh-CN.Continuous minutes must be a positive in: 持续使用分钟数必须为正整数。
zh-CN.Please enter an end time in HH:MM format: 请输入结束时间，格式为 HH:MM。
zh-CN.Please enter a start time in HH:MM forma: 请输入开始时间，格式为 HH:MM。
zh-CN.Rest screen lock minutes must be a posit: 休息锁屏分钟数必须为正整数。
zh-CN.Start time must be in HH:MM (24-hour) fo: 开始时间必须为 HH:MM（24 小时制）格式。
zh-CN.Countdown minutes must be a positive int: 倒计时提示分钟数必须为正整数。
zh-CN.The countdown value must be less than th: 倒计时提示的值，需要小于持续使用的值。
zh-CN.There is no need to run the application: 不需要重复运行应用，运行后可使用 Ctrl+Shift+K 确认。
zh-CN.During unavailable times, a forced scree: 在非可用时间里，会强制锁屏倒计时；倒计时结束前可以手工退出应用，倒计时结束后会自动关机。

en-US.Children, the break starts in %d minutes: Children, the break starts in %d minutes.
en-US.Children, go and see the scenery in the: Children, go and see the scenery in the distance, or read aloud your favorite books or stories.
End time must be later than start time.
en-US.End time must be in HH:MM (24-hour) form: End time must be in HH:MM (24-hour) format.
en-US.Failed to update parent PIN, Please try: Failed to update parent PIN, Please try again.
en-US.Children, it's time to sleep. Power off: Children, it's time to sleep. Power off after %d minutes.
en-US.Children, it's time to sleep; those who: Children, it's time to sleep; those who go to bed early grow tall.
en-US.Continuous minutes must be a positive in: Continuous minutes must be a positive integer.
en-US.Please enter an end time in HH:MM format: Please enter an end time in HH:MM format.
en-US.Please enter a start time in HH:MM forma: Please enter a start time in HH:MM format.
Press Ctrl+Shift+K to choose to close.
en-US.Rest screen lock minutes must be a posit: Rest screen lock minutes must be a positive integer.
en-US.Start time must be in HH:MM (24-hour) fo: Start time must be in HH:MM (24-hour) format.
en-US.Countdown minutes must be a positive int: Countdown minutes must be a positive integer.
en-US.The countdown value must be less than th: The countdown value must be less than the continuous value.
en-US.There is no need to run the application: There is no need to run the application again; after running, you can use Ctrl Shift K to confirm.
en-US.During unavailable times, a forced scree: During unavailable times, a forced screen lock countdown will occur; before the countdown ends, the application can be manually exited, and after the countdown ends, the system will automatically shut down.
